flows.name: create-link
flows.description: User creates a new shareable link for a document or dataroom with configured access controls.

flows.name: edit-link-settings
flows.description: User updates an existing link's settings such as password, expiration, watermark, and permissions.

flows.name: archive-link
flows.description: User archives or unarchives a sharing link to disable access without deleting it.

flows.name: duplicate-link
flows.description: User duplicates an existing link to create a copy with the same configuration.

flows.name: download-link-content
flows.description: User downloads documents or dataroom folders accessible through a link.

flows.name: bulk-import-links
flows.description: User bulk-imports multiple links at once via CSV or batch payload.

flows.name: upload-file-via-link
flows.description: Visitor uploads a file through a link that has upload permissions enabled. (entry: app/(ee)/api/links/[id]/upload/route.ts:1)

flows.name: configure-first-link-flow
flows.description: New user configures link options (email gate, NDA, expiry) for their first shareable link.

features.name: view
features.description: The recipient-facing document and data room viewer — rendering pages, tracking engagement, collecting access form responses, and supporting video and Notion content.

flows.name: view-document-link
flows.description: Visitor opens a shared document link, completes the access form, and views the document.

flows.name: view-dataroom-link
flows.description: Visitor opens a shared dataroom link, authenticates via the access form, and browses dataroom folders and documents.

flows.name: view-dataroom-document
flows.description: Visitor navigates into a specific document inside a dataroom and views its content.

flows.name: download-dataroom-files
flows.description: Visitor requests and downloads files from a shared dataroom link via the downloads panel.

flows.name: view-custom-domain-link
flows.description: Visitor accesses a document or dataroom through a custom branded domain and slug.

flows.name: view-custom-domain-dataroom-document
flows.description: Visitor opens a specific dataroom document via a custom domain link.

flows.name: download-custom-domain-dataroom-files
flows.description: Visitor downloads dataroom files accessed through a custom branded domain.

flows.name: embed-document-link
flows.description: Document link is embedded in an external page and rendered in an iframe embed view.

flows.name: bulk-download-via-link-flow
flows.description: Recipient or admin triggers a bulk download of documents accessible through a link.

flows.name: generate-link-index-flow
flows.description: System generates a navigable index page for a data room link for recipient browsing.

flows.name: track-engagement-analytics-flow
flows.description: Query Tinybird pipes for document and data room view duration and completion metrics.

flows.name: analytics-query-flow
flows.description: Query engagement and event analytics from Tinybird for documents, views, and team metrics.

flows.name: video-tracking-flow
flows.description: Configure and track video playback events during document viewing.

flows.name: viewer-theme-flow
flows.description: Generate adaptive UI themes for document viewer and access form components.

flows.name: view-creation-flow
flows.description: Create a new document or data room view session.

flows.name: track-page-views-flow
flows.description: Record document page view events.

bug_fix_prs.title: fix(dataroom-faq): show full question text instead of truncating to 2 lines (#2162)
bug_fix_prs.author: Marc Seitz

features.name: datarooms
features.description: Secure virtual data rooms for sharing confidential documents with investors, acquirers, or partners — including access control, permissions, branding, freezing/archiving, and viewer invitations.

flows.name: create-dataroom
flows.description: User creates a new dataroom, optionally from a folder, via AI generation, or by starting a trial.

flows.name: browse-dataroom-documents
flows.description: User navigates the dataroom folder hierarchy and views documents inside a dataroom.

flows.name: manage-dataroom-groups-and-permissions
flows.description: User creates viewer groups, adds members, and configures document-level permissions for a dataroom.

flows.name: invite-dataroom-viewers
flows.description: User sends email invitations to viewers via group or link invite, and invitees accept through a verification page.

flows.name: view-dataroom-analytics
flows.description: User reviews visit analytics, per-document engagement, and audit logs for a dataroom.

flows.name: configure-dataroom-settings
flows.description: User adjusts dataroom settings including branding, notifications, download permissions, and danger-zone actions like deletion.

flows.name: freeze-and-archive-dataroom
flows.description: User triggers a dataroom freeze to create an immutable archive and monitors the archiving progress. (entry: app/(ee)/api/teams/[teamId]/datarooms/[id]/freeze/route.ts:1)

flows.name: record-dataroom-view
flows.description: External viewer accesses a dataroom link, triggering a view session to be recorded.

flows.name: view-dataroom-visitor-stats-flow
flows.description: Admin reviews which viewers accessed which documents inside a data room and for how long.

flows.name: start-conversation-flow
flows.description: Viewer submits a question about a document inside a data room, starting a new conversation thread.

flows.name: reply-to-conversation-flow
flows.description: Team member receives a notification and replies to a viewer's question from the conversations dashboard.

flows.name: browse-conversations-flow
flows.description: Admin views all conversations across a data room in the conversation overview page.

flows.name: create-first-dataroom-flow
flows.description: New user selects the data room path in onboarding and sets up their first data room with AI generation or manual upload.

flows.name: dataroom-session-flow
flows.description: Manage dataroom viewer sessions including creation, retrieval, and verification state.

flows.name: domain-redirect-flow
flows.description: Cache and manage domain redirect URLs in Redis.

flows.name: manage-dataroom-freeze-flow
flows.description: Handle frozen dataroom access including token generation and frozen document downloads.

bug_fix_prs.title: fix: send emails without race condition (#2170)
bug_fix_prs.author: Marc Seitz

bug_fix_prs.title: Fix viewer sidebar tree not respecting document/folder reorder (#2133)
bug_fix_prs.author: Marc Seitz

features.name: documents
features.description: Core document management — uploading, organizing, processing, previewing, and managing NDA agreements tied to document access.

flows.name: upload-document
flows.description: User uploads a new document or deck via the onboarding/upload wizard.

flows.name: browse-documents
flows.description: User browses, searches, sorts, and paginates their team's document and folder library.

flows.name: view-document-analytics
flows.description: User views visit stats, link performance, and video analytics for a specific document.

flows.name: browse-hidden-documents
flows.description: User views and unhides documents and folders that have been hidden from the main library.

flows.name: move-document-or-folder
flows.description: User moves a document or folder to a different location within the team or a dataroom.

flows.name: hide-document-or-folder
flows.description: User hides or unhides a document or folder from the main documents view.

flows.name: manage-agreements
flows.description: User views, downloads, and manages NDA or agreement documents associated with document links.

flows.name: annotate-document
flows.description: User adds or edits annotations on a document being previewed via a shared link.

flows.name: preview-link-flow
flows.description: User previews how a link will appear to recipients before sharing it.

flows.name: view-document-engagement-flow
flows.description: User reviews page-level completion stats and average duration for a specific document.

flows.name: upload-first-document-flow
flows.description: New user uploads a document or imports from Notion during the onboarding wizard.

flows.name: document-creation-flow
flows.description: Create and version documents including standard documents and NDA agreements.

flows.name: retrieve-document-content-flow
flows.description: Fetch and serve document files and pages to viewers.

flows.name: manage-file-storage-flow
flows.description: AWS S3 and Lambda client initialization for file operations across teams.

flows.name: delete-files-flow
flows.description: Remove individual and bulk files from storage.

flows.name: organize-folders-flow
flows.description: Create folders in data rooms, main documents, or both locations.

flows.name: document-page-counting-flow
flows.description: Extract page and sheet counts from uploaded documents.

features.name: teams
features.description: Team creation, membership management, role changes, and team-level configuration including AI settings, advanced mode, and folder replication.

flows.name: create-team
flows.description: User creates a new team and becomes its admin.

flows.name: invite-and-manage-team-members
flows.description: Admin invites teammates by email, changes their roles, or removes them from the team.

flows.name: configure-team-settings
flows.description: Admin updates team name, branding, AI settings, advanced mode, survey, and other general settings.

flows.name: manage-team-domains
flows.description: Admin adds, verifies, validates, or removes custom domains for the team.

flows.name: integrate-slack
flows.description: Admin connects and configures the Slack integration to receive team notifications in Slack channels.

flows.name: delete-team
flows.description: Admin permanently deletes the team, cancelling its subscription and removing all associated data.

flows.name: invite-teammate
flows.description: User invites a teammate to their Papermark workspace via email.

flows.name: directory-sync-flow
flows.description: Configure and manage SCIM directory synchronization for team membership.

flows.name: domain-sync-cron-flow
flows.description: Scheduled job to sync and update domain configurations.

flows.name: ai-store-indexing-flow
flows.description: Index documents and datarooms into AI vector stores for Q&A capability.

flows.name: slack-integration-flow
flows.description: Configure Slack environment and format notification messages.

features.name: visitors
features.description: Visitor and contact management — browsing all people who have viewed documents or data rooms, grouping them, and inspecting individual profiles.

flows.name: browse-visitors-and-groups
flows.description: User views the paginated list of all visitors/contacts and their visitor groups, with search and sort controls.

flows.name: view-visitor-detail
flows.description: User drills into a specific visitor's profile to see their document view history, durations, and user-agent details.

flows.name: query-analytics-overview
flows.description: User fetches aggregated analytics (overview, links, documents, visitors, or views) for a team over a selected time interval.

flows.name: inspect-visitor-detail-flow
flows.description: User clicks a visitor to see their full visit history, user agent, custom fields, and per-page time spent.

flows.name: track-viewer-devices-flow
flows.description: Retrieve user agent and device information for document viewers.

flows.name: visitor-context-flow
flows.description: Resolve visitor geolocation and IP address for access tracking.

flows.name: year-in-review-flow
flows.description: Calculate engagement statistics and percentiles for annual review reports.

features.name: billing
features.description: Subscription and billing management — upgrading plans, managing seats, viewing invoices, pausing or cancelling subscriptions, and handling Stripe events.

flows.name: upgrade-subscription-plan
flows.description: User selects and purchases a new or upgraded billing plan for their team via Stripe checkout.

flows.name: manage-billing-portal
flows.description: User opens the Stripe billing portal to manage their existing subscription, add seats, or switch billing intervals.

flows.name: cancel-subscription
flows.description: User initiates subscription cancellation, optionally receives a retention offer, and submits cancellation feedback.

flows.name: pause-subscription
flows.description: User pauses their active subscription for a period instead of cancelling outright.

flows.name: unpause-subscription
flows.description: User or an automated job resumes a previously paused subscription.

flows.name: reactivate-cancelled-subscription
flows.description: User reactivates a subscription that was previously cancelled before the period ends.

flows.name: view-billing-details-and-invoices
flows.description: User fetches their team's current subscription info, plan details, and past invoices.

flows.name: apply-retention-offer
flows.description: User accepts a discount or retention offer presented during the cancellation flow.

flows.name: send-upgrade-notifications
flows.description: System emails users about plan upgrades and sends check-in emails at one and six month intervals after upgrading.

flows.name: billing-plan-flow
flows.description: Retrieve billing plan features, pricing, and subscription limits.

flows.name: stripe-webhook-handler-flow
flows.description: Process incoming Stripe webhook events for subscription and billing updates.

features.name: webhooks
features.description: Outgoing and incoming webhook management — configuring endpoints, subscribing to events, verifying signatures, and monitoring delivery.

flows.name: create-outgoing-webhook
flows.description: Team admin registers a new outgoing webhook with a URL, secret, and event triggers for their team.

flows.name: list-outgoing-webhooks
flows.description: Team member retrieves all configured outgoing webhooks for their team.

flows.name: create-incoming-webhook
flows.description: Team admin creates an incoming webhook endpoint that external services can call to push events into the platform.

flows.name: list-incoming-webhooks
flows.description: Team member lists all incoming webhook endpoints configured for their team.

flows.name: receive-webhook-delivery-callback
flows.description: System receives QStash delivery status callbacks for outgoing webhook events and records success or failure.

flows.name: dispatch-link-view-webhook
flows.description: System fires outgoing webhook events to subscribed endpoints when a document link is viewed.

flows.name: webhook-signature-flow
flows.description: Create cryptographic signatures for outgoing webhook payloads.

flows.name: webhook-schema-flow
flows.description: Validation schemas for creating and updating webhooks.

flows.name: document-content-handling-flow
flows.description: Determine file types, content types, and size limits for document uploads and processing.

flows.name: stripe-plan-utilities-flow
flows.description: Helper functions for mapping Stripe plans to pricing, coupons, and subscription details.

flows.name: send-onboarding-sequence
flows.description: System delivers a multi-day onboarding email series to newly registered users.

features.name: notifications
features.description: Notification delivery system for document views, data room uploads, conversation messages, and access-denied alerts — with per-user preference management.

flows.name: configure-notification-preferences-flow
flows.description: User sets their email notification frequency for document views and data room activity.

flows.name: receive-document-view-notification-flow
flows.description: Team member receives an email notification when someone views their shared document link.

flows.name: receive-dataroom-upload-notification-flow
flows.description: Data room viewer receives a digest email when new documents are added to a data room they have access to.

flows.name: set-notification-preferences-flow
flows.description: User configures their notification frequency (immediate, daily digest, weekly digest, or off) per data room.

flows.name: receive-blocked-access-notification-flow
flows.description: Admin receives an alert when a blocked email address attempts to access a protected link.

flows.name: unsubscribe-from-notifications-flow
flows.description: User clicks an unsubscribe link in an email to opt out of a specific notification type.

flows.name: manage-team-notification-preferences
flows.description: User views and updates their team-level notification preferences via the settings page.

flows.name: manage-dataroom-notification-preferences
flows.description: User opts in or out of notifications for a specific dataroom.

flows.name: send-document-view-notification
flows.description: System dispatches an email notification when a recipient views a shared document.

flows.name: send-dataroom-upload-notification
flows.description: System notifies dataroom members when new documents are uploaded to the dataroom.

flows.name: send-conversation-message-notification
flows.description: System notifies participants when a new message is posted in a conversation thread.

flows.name: send-pause-resume-notification
flows.description: System notifies users when their account or link is paused or resumed.

flows.name: trigger-workflow-entry-access-notification
flows.description: System fires access notifications when a visitor accesses a workflow entry link. (entry: app/(ee)/api/workflow-entry/link/[entryLinkId]/access/route.ts:1)

flows.name: notify-document-viewed
flows.description: System sends an email to the document owner when a recipient views their shared document.

flows.name: notify-dataroom-viewed
flows.description: System sends an email to the dataroom owner when a visitor views their data room.

flows.name: alert-domain-issues
flows.description: System notifies users when their custom domain is invalid, misconfigured, or deleted.

flows.name: send-dataroom-digest
flows.description: System processes and dispatches a digest notification email summarising recent data room activity.

flows.name: connect-slack-integration
flows.description: User authorizes and connects their Slack workspace via OAuth to enable Slack notifications.

flows.name: report-blocked-access-attempt
flows.description: System detects and notifies the team when a blocked email attempts to access a protected link.

flows.name: dataroom-digest-flow
flows.description: Send scheduled daily and weekly digest notifications for dataroom activity.

features.name: auth
features.description: Authentication and account access — sign-in, sign-up, password recovery, email verification, session management.

flows.name: configure-sso-and-directory-sync
flows.description: Admin sets up SAML SSO or SCIM directory sync for the team to enforce single sign-on. (entry: app/(ee)/api/teams/[teamId]/saml/route.ts:1)

flows.name: register-account-flow
flows.description: New user signs up with email or SSO, verifies their email, and lands on the welcome screen.

flows.name: login-flow
flows.description: Returning user logs in with email/password, passkey, or SAML SSO.

flows.name: verify-login-link
flows.description: User verifies their identity through a login link to gain authenticated access.

flows.name: verify-email-login
flows.description: User enters an OTP code to verify their email and complete authentication. (entry: app/(auth)/auth/email/[[...params]]/page.tsx:39)

flows.name: login-with-email-or-password
flows.description: User logs in to Papermark using email/password or magic link credentials. (entry: app/(auth)/login/page.tsx:41)

flows.name: register-new-account
flows.description: User creates a new Papermark account via the registration form. (entry: app/(auth)/register/page.tsx:39)

flows.name: login-with-saml-sso
flows.description: User authenticates via enterprise SAML SSO through the authorize, callback, token, and userinfo endpoints. (entry: app/(auth)/auth/saml/page.tsx:10)

flows.name: verify-auth-code
flows.description: User verifies a one-time authentication code to complete email-based sign-in.

flows.name: manage-passkeys-flow
flows.description: User registers or removes passkeys for passwordless authentication.

flows.name: change-account-security-flow
flows.description: User reviews and updates their account security settings including connected SSO providers.

flows.name: confirm-email-change-flow
flows.description: User confirms a requested email address change by clicking a token link sent to the new address.

flows.name: confirm-email-change
flows.description: User clicks a token link to confirm and apply a requested email address change. (entry: app/(auth)/auth/confirm-email-change/[token]/page.tsx:0)

flows.name: onboard-new-user
flows.description: Newly registered user completes onboarding by uploading a document or configuring a dataroom through the welcome wizard.

flows.name: verify-login-flow
flows.description: Handle email verification and login code lifecycle during authentication.

flows.name: saml-auth-flow
flows.description: Handle SAML-based enterprise authentication and authorization.

features.name: ai
features.description: AI-powered document Q&A and chat — indexing documents into vector stores, chatting with document or data room content, and managing AI agent settings.

flows.name: chat-with-ai
flows.description: User starts a new AI chat session against a document or dataroom and sends messages to receive AI-generated responses. (entry: app/(ee)/api/ai/chat/route.ts:1)

flows.name: continue-ai-chat
flows.description: User retrieves or continues an existing AI chat thread by chat ID. (entry: app/(ee)/api/ai/chat/[chatId]/route.ts:1)

flows.name: send-ai-chat-message
flows.description: User sends a new message within an existing AI chat and streams the AI reply. (entry: app/(ee)/api/ai/chat/[chatId]/messages/route.ts:1)

flows.name: index-document-for-ai
flows.description: Team member triggers AI indexing of a document so it becomes searchable via the vector store. (entry: app/(ee)/api/ai/store/teams/[teamId]/documents/[documentId]/route.ts:1)

flows.name: configure-ai-settings
flows.description: Team admin enables or adjusts AI features (agents, indexing) for their team.

flows.name: manage-dataroom-conversation
flows.description: Viewer or team member starts or replies to a conversation thread within a dataroom.

flows.name: toggle-dataroom-conversations
flows.description: Team admin enables or disables the conversations feature for a specific dataroom.

flows.name: view-visitor-conversation
flows.description: A document viewer initiates or continues a conversation from the public-facing viewer side.

flows.name: manage-ai-knowledge-store
flows.description: User enables or removes AI document indexing at the team, dataroom, or document level. (entry: app/(ee)/api/ai/store/teams/[teamId]/route.ts:1)

flows.name: ai-dataroom-prompts-flow
flows.description: Generate system and user prompts for AI-powered dataroom interactions.

flows.name: ai-chat-flow
flows.description: Manage AI chat sessions including creation, retrieval, and deletion of chat conversations.

flows.name: remove-ai-document-index-flow
flows.description: Delete a document from the AI vector store when it is removed or no longer needs indexing.

features.name: ee
features.description: Files under ee/ extracted from datarooms (auto-split for granularity)

bug_fix_prs.title: fix: send emails without race condition (#2170)
bug_fix_prs.author: Marc Seitz

bug_fix_prs.title: Fix viewer sidebar tree not respecting document/folder reorder (#2133)
bug_fix_prs.author: Marc Seitz

features.name: workflows
features.description: Automated link routing workflows that evaluate conditions (email domain, viewer attributes) and execute actions like granting access or sending notifications.

flows.name: create-workflow
flows.description: User creates a new workflow for their team. (entry: app/(ee)/api/workflows/route.ts:16)

flows.name: list-workflows
flows.description: User views all workflows associated with their team.

flows.name: view-workflow-detail
flows.description: User opens a specific workflow to inspect its configuration and steps.

flows.name: add-workflow-step
flows.description: User adds a new step to an existing workflow. (entry: app/(ee)/api/workflows/[workflowId]/steps/route.ts:17)

flows.name: edit-workflow-step
flows.description: User updates the conditions and actions of an individual workflow step. (entry: app/(ee)/api/workflows/[workflowId]/steps/[stepId]/route.ts:17)

flows.name: view-workflow-executions
flows.description: User reviews the execution history and run logs for a workflow. (entry: app/(ee)/api/workflows/[workflowId]/executions/route.ts:9)

flows.name: update-workflow
flows.description: User edits a workflow's name, status, or access settings. (entry: app/(ee)/api/workflows/[workflowId]/route.ts:16)

flows.name: workflow-management-flow
flows.description: Create, update, and delete automated link routing workflows and their steps.

flows.name: workflow-entry-access-flow
flows.description: Evaluate workflow conditions and grant access to links based on domain or visitor attributes.

flows.name: view-analytics-overview
flows.description: User views team analytics including link, document, visitor, and view counts across a selected time range.

flows.name: publish-faq-from-conversation
flows.description: User publishes a visitor conversation as a public FAQ entry with configurable visibility scope.

flows.name: edit-published-faq
flows.description: User edits an existing published FAQ's question, answer, and visibility settings.

flows.name: view-dashboard-overview-flow
flows.description: User opens the main dashboard to see recent document views, active links, and top visitors at a glance.

flows.name: filter-analytics-by-time-range-flow
flows.display_name: Filter Analytics by Time Range Flow
flows.description: User selects a time range to filter the analytics charts and tables.
